nasb.text: You shall give to the Levitical priests who are from the offspring of Zadok, who draw near to Me to minister to Me,’ declares the Lord God, ‘a young bull for a sin offering.

esv.text: you shall give to the Levitical priests of the family of Zadok, who draw near to me to minister to me, declares the Lord God, a bull from the herd for a sin offering.

cnv.text: 你要把一頭公牛犢給那些親近我、事奉我的祭司利未人作贖罪祭，他們是撒督的後裔。這是主耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 你要将一头公牛犊作为赎罪祭给撒督后裔中做祭司的利未人，他们可以前来事奉我。这是主耶和华说的。
